task_completion.description: A new Duct component is added to the model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP Geometry Browser, a new component of type 'Duct' is visible alongside the baseline fuselage.

task_completion.description: The duct component is renamed to 'Center_S_Duct'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP Geometry Browser, the newly added duct component is explicitly named 'Center_S_Duct'.

task_completion.description: The duct is positioned at global X=16.0 m and Z=1.0 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the component's Design or Location tab, the X location parameter is set to 16.0 and the Z location parameter is set to 1.0.

task_completion.description: The duct's overall length is set to 4.5 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the component's Design tab, the overall Length parameter is set to 4.5.

task_completion.description: The Inlet (first section) Z_Offset is set to 1.2 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the XSec tab with the first cross-section (Inlet) selected, the Z_Offset parameter is set to 1.2.

task_completion.description: The Exit (last section) Z_Offset is set to -0.2 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the XSec tab with the last cross-section (Exit) selected, the Z_Offset parameter is set to -0.2.

task_completion.description: The modified model is saved as bizjet_trijet.vsp3 in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP main window title bar displays 'bizjet_trijet.vsp3', or a file manager/save dialog shows the file saved in ~/Documents/OpenVSP/.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP application open with parameter windows being actively modified, rather than a text editor modifying the .vsp3 XML file directly.

integrity.description: The OpenVSP 3D workspace renders the actual S-duct geometry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view in OpenVSP shows the visual representation of the S-duct attached to the fuselage, confirming the parameters were actually applied.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog or the updated filename in the OpenVSP title bar, rather than terminal commands simply copying/renaming the baseline file.
